title: Medical Billing Company Vetting Guide
subtitle: Select the Right Billing Partner for Your Practice
description: Choosing the wrong medical billing vendor can drain revenue and create compliance headaches. This guide gives practice managers a systematic framework for evaluating candidates, comparing credentials, and avoiding the costly mistakes most clinics make.
bullets: Verify CHBME certification and compliance track record
Compare denial rates: top vendors maintain below 5%
Confirm 24–48 hour turnaround on routine claims
Check state regulations early—rules vary significantly by region

title: Medical Billing Rate Guide 2026
subtitle: See what medical billing should cost in your state
description: Practice managers need accurate pricing data to make billing outsourcing decisions. This guide reveals 2026 market rates by state, practice size, and fee structure—so you budget accurately and negotiate confidently.
bullets: Benchmark your current rates against all 50 states' data
See per-claim, percentage, and monthly fee structure ranges
Identify overpriced contracts with state-specific market comparisons
Negotiate confidently using CHBME-backed 2026 benchmark data

title: RCM Vendor Transition Checklist
subtitle: Protect your revenue during every RCM vendor transition
description: RCM vendor transitions risk revenue loss and compliance gaps. This checklist walks practice managers through each critical handoff step, from data validation to claims reconciliation. CHBME-certified advisors use this framework to prevent billing disruptions and protect cash flow.
bullets: Prevent $50K+ revenue loss with pre-transition claims validation
Navigate vendor handoff without disrupting billing operations
Verify HIPAA and claims payer compliance requirements
Use the exact vendor transition steps RCM pros recommend
